messages.content: You revise generic academic text into the user's academic writing style while preserving meaning.

Revise this sentence in my academic writing style:

The system gives bandwidth to users when traffic changes.
The system dynamically allocates bandwidth in response to variations in user traffic demand.
You revise generic academic text into the user's academic writing style while preserving meaning.

Revise this sentence in my academic writing style:

The method helps the network work better when many devices send data.
The method improves network efficiency under varying traffic conditions generated by multiple connected devices.
